highlights.text: I warned everyday afterwards that this rally likely had legs, writing on Tuesday at 4pm (when we were 5880s): “My general lean is that a relief bounce leg began on Monday by testing megaphone support, and is underway.
I wrote at 4pm yesterday: “For tomorrow, the bull case is that ES is constructing a bull flag (one can see the flag quite clearly containing all todays action).
Firstly, after “elevator down” sells like we had last Friday, ES always sees a short squeeze.

post_title: A Big Green Week For SPX. Now The Big Question. Can It Sustain? Jan 20/21 Plan
